<?php namespace Illuminate\Cache\Events; class RetrievingManyKeys extends CacheEvent { /** * The keys that are being retrieved. * * @var array */ public $keys; /** * Create a new event instance. * * @param string|null $storeName * @param array $keys * @param array $tags */ public function __construct($storeName, $keys, array $tags = []) { parent::__construct($storeName, $keys[0] ?? '', $tags); $this->keys = $keys; } }
